response.overview: Eighteen Years of Love is a documentary that explores the impact one person's love can have on the world. Through a series of interviews with friends and family, the film follows Merlyn and examines how her compassion, kindness, and love have shaped the lives of those around her. Each interview offers a personal perspective, creating a heartfelt portrait of a woman whose influence extends far beyond herself.
response.tagline: A celebration of a life lived through love
response.title: Eighteen Years of Love
